title: ASM v2 Wiki migration track - source of truth
description: Source-of-truth bead for ASM v2 replacing Qdrant semantic memory with LLM Wiki while keeping SlotDB runtime state and canonical project index engine.
design:
Execution source-of-truth for ASM v2 Wiki has now been split into explicit planning vs implementation phases.

Current directive:
- Planning-only beads may close once docs/scaffolds exist.
- No bead may claim implementation complete unless code paths are patched and verification commands are recorded as passing.

3. Verification gate: build/test artifacts must prove the implementation state before closure.

Mandatory evidence for implementation beads:
- Exact files changed
- Exact commands run
- PASS/FAIL result summary
- Any remaining gaps/blockers

- Planning/spec: r4t.1, r4t.2, r4t.5
- Implementation: r4t.6, r4t.7, r4t.8
- Optional docs/integration after implementation: r4t.4
acceptance_criteria: bead tree explicitly separates planning vs implementation; implementation beads require changed files + build/test evidence; source-of-truth makes it impossible to confuse docs/scaffolds with completed feature work
notes: Phase 1 đã chốt các lane design/migration/retrieval/capture/runtime-cleanup/corrective migration. Phase 2 chuyển sang kiến trúc LLM Wiki hoàn chỉnh theo hướng bootstrap-safe + same-agent isolated continuation distill + drafts/gate + briefing-first. Jira/source-of-truth roadmap Phase 2: ASM-131/132/133/134; bead tree nội bộ sync tương ứng r4t.15/16/17/18.

design:
Mapped from Jira ASM-131. Scope: raw-first auto-capture, deterministic bootstrap briefing, and no hard dependency on distill agent at bootstrap. Keep SlotDB/runtime-state usable from first install.

References:
- Karpathy LLM Wiki: persistent wiki should compound over time, but bootstrap must still work before refinement matures.
- Hermes image principle: raw should not be treated as final live truth.
- Forensic conclusion: distill capability must be optional at bootstrap; raw + SlotDB + bootstrap briefing remain mandatory.
acceptance_criteria: bootstrap mode works without distill capability; raw capture + SlotDB + bootstrap briefing are available; docs/tests note bootstrap-safe behavior
notes: Synced from Jira ASM-131. Recommended first implementation bead of Phase 2.

title: Same-agent isolated continuation distill session and structured contract
description: Dùng chính agent hiện tại để distill nhưng qua isolated continuation session, với output contract structured.
design:
Mapped from Jira ASM-132. Scope: replace synchronous llm-extractor dependency in auto-capture path with same-agent isolated continuation session.

Critical forensic references:
- Current auto-capture is attached to AGENT_END_EVENT in src/hooks/auto-capture.ts.
- Same-session direct sendEventSystemMessage/heartbeatnow distill has high loop risk because apply/distill outputs can re-trigger capture.
- Preferred primitive: same agent role in isolated continuation session, returning structured JSON contract (slot_updates, slot_removals, memories, draft_updates, briefing_updates, log_entries, promotion_hints).

This bead should carry explicit references to the forensic conclusion in notes/comments so implementers do not regress into same-session loop patterns.
acceptance_criteria: structured distill contract exists; same-agent isolated continuation session strategy is documented/implemented; no same-session direct distill trigger is introduced
notes: Synced from Jira ASM-132. Reference point for isolated continuation session decision.

comments.text:
Detailed execution packet for this bead:

Mission:
- Finish the architecture cleanup by moving the existing extractor logic fully behind the isolated continuation boundary.
- Keep one extraction engine only. Do NOT create a parallel extractor implementation. Do NOT leave host-side LLM/extractor decision logic alive.

Why this bead exists:
- We traced that auto-capture still had residual host-side gating / stale dependency patterns around distill.
- The correct architecture is: host runtime prepares input -> invokes isolated continuation -> receives structured result/fallback -> deterministic apply.
- The wrong architecture is: host runtime still does LLM/extractor gating or keeps a second extraction path before continuation.

Non-negotiable design rule:
- Refactor by relocation, not duplication.
- The current extractor logic must be relocated behind isolated continuation, not reimplemented in parallel.

Required implementation outcome:
1) Identify the canonical extractor logic and keep it as the only extraction implementation.
2) Ensure that extraction, parsing, sanitization, structured contract generation, and failure translation are all continuation-side responsibilities.
3) Ensure host-side auto-capture does NOT:
   - health-check local LLM/extractor before continuation
   - hold duplicate extraction logic
   - own prompt/model/parsing/sanitization logic outside continuation boundary
4) Host-side may only:
   - build input context
   - invoke isolated continuation
   - receive structured contract or structured fallback
   - pass result into deterministic apply layer
5) Preserve all established guarantees:
   - .15 bootstrap-safe raw-first
   - .16 isolated continuation structured fallback
   - .17 deterministic apply + loop guards
   - .18 drafts/promotion/briefing semantics

Explicit anti-goals:
- Do NOT delete extractor logic if it is still the canonical engine.
- Do NOT write a new second extractor just for continuation.
- Do NOT reintroduce same-session direct sendEventSystemMessage/heartbeatnow primitive.
- Do NOT reintroduce operator-facing local LLM gate/config contract in host runtime path.

Repo surfaces that must be reviewed:
- src/hooks/auto-capture.ts
- src/services/llm-extractor.ts
- src/adapters/openclaw/plugin-register.ts
- any new continuation worker/helper files introduced earlier
- tests/test-cognitive-memory.ts
- tests/test-semantic-memory-usecase.ts

Acceptance proof must include:
- changed files list
- exact statement of what moved from host-side to continuation-side
- grep/diff evidence that no duplicate extractor path remains in host runtime path
- verification commands and PASS/FAIL
- exact behavior after fix (host invokes continuation directly; fallback only at continuation boundary)

Success condition:
- After this bead, there is exactly one extractor logic path, and it lives behind isolated continuation. Host runtime no longer acts like a quasi-extractor controller beyond invoking continuation and consuming structured outputs.

comments.author: mrcagents
comments.text:
Decomposition note (authoritative) for this bead so implementation does not conflate responsibilities:

This line must now be treated as 3 distinct layers, not a single blended 'extractor/distill/apply' blob.

1) Extractor layer
- Responsibility: read raw conversation/current context and produce candidate structured signals.
- Output examples: slot_updates, slot_removals, memory candidates, draft candidates, briefing candidates, promotion hints.
- Question answered: 'What can be extracted from this conversation/context?'
- Extractor output is NOT automatically final truth. It is candidate structured material.

2) Distill layer
- Responsibility: refine/select/drop/promote-worthiness decisions on top of candidate extraction output.
- Distill decides what should be ignored, what should remain draft-level, what is live-worthy, and what should become briefing material.
- Question answered: 'Among extracted candidates, what is worth keeping/promoting/refining?'
- Distill must not be conflated with raw extraction and must not be collapsed into apply logic.

3) Apply / Memory arrangement layer
- Responsibility: deterministically write accepted/refined outputs into SlotDB and memory layers (, , , ) with loop guards and promotion semantics.
- Question answered: 'Where does each accepted/refined output go?'
- Apply must remain deterministic, guarded, and separate from extraction/distill reasoning.

Critical architecture rule:
- Do NOT collapse these 3 layers into one responsibility blob.
- Do NOT duplicate logic by creating parallel extraction/distill engines.
- Do NOT let host runtime perform distill reasoning or arrangement decisions that belong inside the correct layer boundaries.

Implication for this bead:
- Existing  logic must be reviewed and mapped carefully:
  - which parts are pure extraction,
  - which parts are distill/refinement,
  - which parts are apply/arrangement side effects.
- Cleanup work must relocate responsibilities correctly, not merely move code wholesale without layer separation.

Success condition update:
- The result of r4t.22 must show a clean 3-layer boundary (Extractor / Distill / Apply) and make the codebase easier to reason about, with no duplication and no host-side boundary violations.

Apply layer writes into `raw`, `drafts`, `live`, `briefings`, and SlotDB. Existing `llm-extractor` logic must be reviewed against these 3 responsibilities without collapsing them or duplicating them.

comments.text:
Authoritative execution packet for this critical lane:

Mission:
- Remove the fake isolated wrapper + external LLM worker implementation from ASM distill.
- Replace it with true continuation-agent-native extraction/distillation.

Problem statement (already proven):
- Current so-called isolated continuation path still spawns a worker process.
- That worker reads ASM_DISTILL_LLM_BASE_URL / ASM_DISTILL_LLM_API_KEY / ASM_DISTILL_LLM_MODEL.
- The worker performs direct /chat/completions calls itself.
- Therefore the implementation is NOT agent-native continuation distill; it is only a wrapper around the old external-model approach.
- When the env is missing, worker fails and fallback triggers, proving the design is wrong for the intended architecture.

Source-of-truth user requirement:
- Distill/extract must be done by the isolated continuation agent/native session itself.
- Host/runtime must not carry model config or depend on ASM_DISTILL_LLM_* for this lane.
- Do not patch env. Do not add more config. Remove the worker-based approach.

Required implementation outcome:
1) Remove worker-based distill execution from the isolated continuation path.
2) Remove dependence on ASM_DISTILL_LLM_BASE_URL / ASM_DISTILL_LLM_API_KEY / ASM_DISTILL_LLM_MODEL for isolated distill/extract.
3) Make continuation/native agent session perform extraction + distillation itself.
4) Preserve existing structured contract expectations as much as possible:
   - slot_updates
   - slot_removals
   - memories
   - draft_updates
   - briefing_updates
   - log_entries
   - promotion_hints

   - bootstrap-safe fallback
   - deterministic apply
   - loop guards

Non-negotiable constraints:
- Do NOT keep a hidden worker fallback for the same path.
- Do NOT reintroduce host-side LLM gating.
- Do NOT solve this by restoring env/config hacks.
- Do NOT create a second parallel distill engine.
- Keep one canonical Extractor/Distill/Apply flow.

- exact statement of new continuation-agent-native execution path
- grep proof showing ASM_DISTILL_LLM_* path is gone from isolated distill lane
- commands and PASS/FAIL

title: ASM v2 Wiki migration track - source of truth bead
description: Track tổng cho nhánh ASM v2 theo hướng thay semantic/Qdrant memory bằng LLM Wiki, giữ nguyên SlotDB cho runtime state và giữ canonical project index engine riêng. Đây là bead source-of-truth ở repo level để triển khai song song với Jira Epic ASM-123.
design:
ASM v2 Wiki track là nhánh thay thế semantic memory dùng Qdrant bằng LLM Wiki, nhưng KHÔNG thay SlotDB runtime state và KHÔNG thay canonical project index engine.

Hiểu đúng ASM hiện tại:
1. SlotDB đang giữ runtime state ngắn hạn, deterministic: current-state, project_living_state, recent updates, dedupe hash, cursors, scoped slot values.
2. Qdrant/embedding đang giữ semantic memory: auto-capture -> embed/upsert, memory_search -> embed/query, auto-recall -> inject semantic memories.
3. Project-aware/index layer đang giữ canonical facts về repo/project: registry, source_rev, file/subsystem/related_files/feature-pack enrichment, provenance, code-aware retrieval. Đây là phần backbone phải giữ nguyên.

Vì vậy ASM v2 phase 1 chỉ thay lớp (2) bằng wiki, không đụng vào (1) và (3).

Target architecture phase 1:
- SlotDB = giữ nguyên cho runtime state.
- Canonical project index = giữ nguyên cho project/code-aware facts.
- memory/wiki/ = lớp mới thay semantic memory.
- Obsidian = viewer/editor/graph cho con người, không phải runtime engine.

Memory/wiki tối giản theo đúng tinh thần Karpathy LLM Wiki + swarm image:
- raw/ = outputs thô từ chat/tool/agent hoặc artifacts cần distill
- live/ = page tri thức đã được LLM tổng hợp để dùng recall
- briefings/ = context pack ngắn cho agent/project/domain
- index.md = catalog nội dung wiki
- log.md = timeline ingest/update/correction
- schema.md = rule tối thiểu cho page format/naming
- drafts/ là optional, chỉ thêm nếu cần review nhẹ; không bắt buộc ở phase 1.

Flow phase 1:
- capture: ASM nhận input -> append raw/ -> LLM distill/update live page -> refresh index.md -> optional refresh briefing.
- search/recall: đọc SlotDB/current state trước; nếu query thuộc project/code-aware thì gọi canonical project index trước; sau đó đọc briefings/index/live pages để synthesize.
- correct: khi người dùng/chính agent phát hiện sai -> sửa canonical live page + append log.md + rebuild briefing nếu cần.

Ràng buộc quan trọng:
- Không migrate canonical project index sang wiki.
- Không để wiki trở thành source-of-truth cho file tree/source_rev/related_files/subsystems.
- Search trong phase 1 có thể chỉ dùng index + page traversal; nếu scale lớn mới thêm BM25/qmd/ripgrep prefilter.
- Không over-engineer lifecycle ở phase 1; ưu tiên raw -> live -> briefing.

Success criteria ở mức track:
- Có spec rõ cho phase 1 tối giản.
- Có migration path từ Qdrant sang wiki cho memory layer.
- Có retrieval path mới bám theo state + project facts + wiki.
- Có Obsidian integration như viewer/editor, không làm runtime phụ thuộc Obsidian.
acceptance_criteria:
- Có bead tổng active cho ASM v2 Wiki track
- External ref trỏ ASM-123
- Notes chốt rõ scope: thay memory layer, không thay project index engine
- Bead dùng để điều phối các bead con tiếp theo
notes: Source of truth bead for OpenCode execution. Jira is for human/project tracking; beads must contain enough repo/runtime detail for agent execution. Related Jira: ASM-123 epic; ASM-124 design; ASM-126 retrieve; ASM-128 migration; ASM-129 obsidian; ASM-130 export+mapping. Legacy planning: .planning/done for completed Qdrant autocreate plans; .planning/superseded/asm-122-plan.md replaced by this track.

title: Design spec for ASM v2 Wiki memory
description: Viết spec thiết kế cho ASM v2 Wiki memory theo tinh thần Karpathy LLM Wiki + swarm raw/live/briefing pattern, nhưng bám sát ASM hiện tại.
design:
This bead produces the implementation-facing design spec for ASM v2 Wiki memory.

The spec must be intentionally minimal for phase 1 and avoid over-engineering. It must reflect the user correction that the initial analysis drifted too far beyond Karpathy Wiki + the swarm raw/live/briefing image.

What the spec must contain:
1. Clear split of responsibilities
- SlotDB: runtime state only
- Project index engine: canonical project/code-aware facts only
- Wiki: semantic memory replacement only
- Obsidian: viewer/editor only

2. Folder structure for phase 1
memory/wiki/
  raw/
  live/
  briefings/
  index.md
  log.md
  schema.md
Optional: drafts/ only if a review layer is truly needed later.

3. Page taxonomy kept simple
- live/projects/<project>.md = project understanding / lessons / summaries
- live/concepts/<topic>.md = reusable lessons / runbooks / decisions
- live/entities/<entity>.md = stable preferences or named concepts if needed
- briefings/<project-or-agent>.md = short context pack for injection
No giant taxonomy explosion in phase 1.

4. Capture flow
- Capture raw event/output into raw/
- Distill into a canonical live page
- Update index.md and log.md
- Optionally update affected briefing

5. Retrieval flow
- Read SlotDB current state first
- If code-aware/project-aware query: call project index engine first
- Then read briefing + index + selected live pages
- Synthesize answer

6. Migration guidance
- Only memory layer migrates from Qdrant
- Group old vectors by canonical topic/page
- Do not create one markdown file per vector point

The spec should be directly actionable by OpenCode and future implementers.
acceptance_criteria:
- Có tài liệu spec draft
- Chốt phase 1 tối giản, tránh over-engineering
- Chốt mapping giữa ASM hiện tại và ASM v2
notes: Must explicitly mention previous over-engineering correction: phase 1 is raw -> live -> briefing, with drafts optional. Output should likely live under docs/ and become the execution truth for code changes. Jira ref ASM-124.

title: Qdrant to Wiki migration plan and export mapping
description: Chuẩn bị migration từ semantic memory dùng Qdrant sang LLM Wiki, chỉ áp cho memory layer.
design:
This bead owns migration of the semantic memory layer from Qdrant to Wiki.

Scope boundaries:
- In scope: Qdrant-stored semantic memory currently used by memory_store / memory_search / auto-recall.
- Out of scope: canonical project index artifacts and structured project/code-aware query engine.

Migration phases:
1. Parallel phase
- Keep Qdrant writes alive
- Start writing wiki pages in parallel
- Compare outputs for quality and gaps

2. Wiki-first phase
- Retrieve from wiki first
- Keep Qdrant as fallback only
- Observe regressions / missing memory classes

3. Cutover
- Export Qdrant points
- Group by canonical topic/page
- Batch-ingest into wiki pages
- Verify quality / coverage
- Freeze Qdrant writes
- Keep backup for rollback

Key migration rule:
NEVER map one Qdrant point to one markdown file.
Instead group by canonical destination:
- session summaries -> sessions/day pages
- runbooks/lessons -> concepts/decision pages
- stable preferences / agent context -> entities/ or project pages

Subtask ASM-130 covers export script + mapping spec details and should feed this migration bead.
acceptance_criteria:
- Có kế hoạch migration tổng
- Có sub-bead export script + mapping spec
- Chốt rõ rollback / backup / cutover gates
notes: Migration bead must stay tightly scoped to semantic memory replacement. It should also define validation criteria: recall parity acceptable enough for wiki-first, no project-fact regression because project index stays canonical. Jira refs ASM-128 and ASM-130.

title: Implement wiki retrieve path replacing semantic recall
description: Thiết kế/triển khai đường retrieve mới dựa trên state + project facts + wiki pages thay cho Qdrant search ở memory layer.
design:
This bead owns the new retrieval path replacing vector semantic recall.

Required retrieval order:
1. SlotDB / runtime state first for current-session or current-focus questions.
2. Canonical project index first for project-aware/code-aware queries (repo files, related files, source_rev, subsystem facts, provenance).
3. Wiki briefings + index + selected live pages for semantic/project-understanding recall.

Important guardrails:
- Wiki must not replace or override source-of-truth project facts.
- Briefings are short context packs; live pages hold richer memory; raw is not default recall material.
- For phase 1, retrieval may simply use index.md plus live page traversal. If scale becomes too large, add BM25/qmd/ripgrep prefilter, but keep wiki pages as the truth layer.

Expected integration points:
- auto-recall hook
- memory_search tool/usecase
- maybe helper functions for reading index + selecting pages

Expected output from implementer:
- route policy draft
- changed code path list
- fallback behavior if briefing/index page missing
acceptance_criteria:
- Chốt retrieval route mới
- Không để wiki thay thế source-of-truth của project index
- Có đường hướng integrate với existing auto-recall
notes: This bead must preserve ASM's project-aware strengths while removing vector dependence from semantic recall. Jira ref ASM-126.

title: ASM Wiki-first system redesign execution track
description: Authoritative execution tree for the wiki-first redesign of ASM across runtime read-path, runtime contract, install/setup orchestration, and verification. Derived from research/specs/asm-wiki-first-system-redesign-2026-04-09.md and research/specs/asm-wiki-first-system-implementation-plan-2026-04-09.md.
design:
Source-of-truth for execution is the pair of spec/plan docs under research/specs dated 2026-04-09. This track replaces the prior corrective/cleanup-oriented legacy execution lane.

Top-level execution model:
1. Refactor read-path from snippet recall to wiki-first working-set construction.
2. Preserve write-path and continuation-owned write-back semantics.
3. Add runtime contract for wiki-first mode.
4. Add install/setup orchestration for system-wide bootstrap and reinforcement surfaces.
5. Verify runtime behavior across Wiki + SlotDB + graph.

Non-negotiables:
- No local fake distill/extractor reintroduction.
- No env-based distill ownership.
- Wiki remains primary knowledge surface; SlotDB remains state/control; graph remains relation/routing support.
- Setup/init must be idempotent and rerunnable.
- AGENTS.md is reinforcement, not primary source-of-truth.

Planning/execution split:
- r5t.1/.2/.3/.4 are execution beads for foundation layers.
- r5t.5 is install/setup orchestration.
- r5t.6 is verification and truth-gate.

Any future implementation must cite the two spec files explicitly in comments/evidence.
